underlying_signals.label: Volatile SVG noise
underlying_signals.reason: Raw SVG differs, but semantic normalization removed the difference. Treat this as volatile serialization noise until a stage trace proves a semantic mismatch.

fix_suggestions.label: Volatile SVG noise
fix_suggestions.reason: Semantic diff is empty after normalization, so do not change Rust logic yet. First verify whether the remaining raw drift is only unstable ids, metadata, or processing instructions.

code_anchors.label: Activity note chain
code_anchors.reason: Activity note mismatches often split between FtileWithNotes/FtileWithNoteOpale selection and Opale polygon routing.
